method_summary: Dynamic short convolutions are applied to key, query, and value representations in Transformers, with custom Triton kernels enabling efficient training.
key_innovation: Application of dynamic short convolutions to Transformer components (key, query, value) and after every linear layer, providing compute advantages.

key_results.compute_advantage_all_layers: 1.60× advantage when adding dynamic convolutions after every linear layer

best_result: Dynamic convolutions consistently outperform standard Transformers and Transformers with static convolutions across language-modeling experiments from 150M to 2B parameters.
title: Dynamic Short Convolutions Improve Transformers
